SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into this 5th day of October, 2023 by and between:

SELLER: Mr. John Tan, NRIC No. S2345678D, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #10-01, Singapore 234567. Contact: +65 6123 4567, Email: johntan@fictionalmail.sg

AND

BUYER: Dr. Emily Wong, NRIC No. S8765432C, of Wong Enterprises Pte. Ltd., UEN: 198765432X, having its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #20-02, Singapore 048621. Contact: +65 6987 1234, Email: emilywong@enterprise.sg

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell and the Buyer agrees to purchase 10,000 ordinary shares of ABC Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 1,500,000.
